title: membership — TenancyHook + lifecycle hooks
description: Twelve hooks. Two are LOAD-BEARING — CreateInvoiceOnMembershipCreated (atomic invoice creation) and SnapshotTaxCalculationOnMembershipCreated (frozen tax audit). Three cascade prevention (plan archive / branch archive / athlete + tenant erasure). Six domain hooks driving pass generation + retry ladder + refund calculation. One coupon snapshot hook.

hooks.name: CreateInvoiceOnMembershipCreated
hooks.purpose: LOAD-BEARING. Opens (or joins) a DB transaction; creates the invoice::Invoice row with total_amount = price_snapshot_cents + tax_amount - coupon_discount, currency = membership.currency, status = 'pending'; back-references membership_id on the invoice. On failure, rolls back BOTH writes + fires MEMBERSHIP_INVOICE_CREATE_FAILED (500, retryable). Verified by the atomic_membership_invoice_creation rule as a post-hook assertion.
hooks.note: Priority 5 — runs BEFORE any other listener on the create. Every subsequent step assumes the invoice exists.

hooks.name: SnapshotTaxCalculationOnMembershipCreated
hooks.purpose: Invokes tax::TaxCalculator.calculate(region_id, price_cents, currency) and FREEZES the result on membership.tax_calculation_id + membership.tax_calculation_snapshot. IMMUTABLE thereafter — mid-contract VAT changes never re-apply. Priority 8 — runs after CreateInvoiceOnMembershipCreated but before other listeners.

hooks.name: SnapshotCouponRedemptionOnMembershipCreated
hooks.purpose: When coupon_id set, invokes coupon::CouponRedeemer.redeem(coupon_id, membership) with in-transaction row lock; freezes the resulting discount details on membership.coupon_snapshot; increments coupon usage counter. On CouponRedeemer refusal (expired / max_uses / not_applicable), rolls back the whole membership create + fires MEMBERSHIP_COUPON_INVALID.

hooks.name: GeneratePassesOnMembershipActivated
hooks.purpose: Post-commit hook. Dispatches IssuePassesForPeriodJob to generate plan.passes_per_period Pass rows for the current period (valid_from = current_period_starts_at, valid_until = current_period_ends_at, pass_type = 'trial' if trial else 'standard').

hooks.name: ExtendPeriodOnRenewalSucceeded
hooks.purpose: Advances membership.current_period_starts_at + current_period_ends_at by billing_interval * billing_interval_count. Sets next_renewal_at = new current_period_ends_at (unless lifetime). Resets consecutive_failed_renewal_count = 0. Increments lifetime_value_cents by renewal.total_amount_cents. Dispatches IssuePassesForPeriodJob for the new period. If plan.passes_carry_over = true, unused passes from the previous period are re-issued as pass_type='carryover' with the new valid_until.

hooks.name: TriggerRetryLadderOnRenewalFailed
hooks.purpose: Increments membership.consecutive_failed_renewal_count. If renewal.attempt_number < 4, schedules RetryFailedRenewalJob at next_attempt_at (day+3 / day+7 / day+14 per attempt_number). If attempt_number >= 3 AND consecutive_failed_renewal_count >= 3, schedules LapseMembershipJob after final attempt window. Dispatches NotifyPaymentFailureJob for dunning email cadence (24h / 72h / 7d).

hooks.name: ExpirePassesOnMembershipLapsed
hooks.purpose: Marks all unconsumed passes for the membership as expired (sets valid_until = now(), fires PassExpired per pass). Lapsed = involuntary termination; unlike cancelled where remaining period passes stay valid.

hooks.name: ExpirePassesOnMembershipCancelled
hooks.purpose: For hard cancels: expires all unconsumed passes immediately. For soft cancels (period-end): NO-OP — passes remain valid through the period (ExpireStalePassesJob handles the natural expiry at valid_until).

hooks.name: CalculateProratedRefundOnHardCancel
hooks.purpose: Enterprise-only. Computes prorated refund = price_snapshot_cents * (days_remaining / period_days). For 'full_within_grace' policy AND within refund_grace_days of contract signing, computes full price_snapshot_cents refund instead. Dispatches a refund request to the refund module (Wave 4.5+ — currently emits a stub event). Records refund_id + refund_amount_cents on membership.metadata.

hooks.name: PreventPlanArchiveWithActiveMemberships
hooks.purpose: Refuses plan archive when Membership rows in status IN ('pending', 'active', 'paused') reference the plan. Admin must first migrate memberships to another plan (via /upgrade or /downgrade endpoints) or wait for terminal transitions.
hooks.returns: MEMBERSHIP_PLAN_HAS_ACTIVE_MEMBERSHIPS (409) with active membership count in error payload

hooks.name: PreventBranchArchiveWithActiveMemberships
hooks.purpose: Refuses the branch archive when active memberships reference it. Admin must migrate or terminate memberships first.

hooks.name: PurgeMembershipDataForErasedTenant
hooks.purpose: Cascade delete via FK. Refund records + Invoice records + Renewal records survive as compliance archive rows (managed by compliance module — retention: 10 years SOX 404). Writes compliance audit + emits count metrics per aggregate.

no_bootstrapper.reason: Membership does not need a tenant-boot hydration path. Every row loads on demand.
